For Job Seekers

Your Path to a Trusted Career Abroad

ZEGORA supports Ethiopian professionals through every step of the overseas employment journey — with transparency and care.

Guidance

Honest advice on roles, countries and what to expect.

Documentation

Help preparing passport, medical and certification paperwork.

Ethical Placement

Placement only with verified, compliant employers.

Pre-Departure & Arrival

Orientation, travel coordination and post-arrival follow-up.

Have questions about working abroad?

Reach out to our team — we'll guide you through every step.

Contact ZEGORA

Zegora Foreign Private Employment Agent (zegoraagency.com) — a trusted pioneer with over 20 years connecting Ethiopian talent with global employment opportunities.

20+ Years · Trusted Industry Pioneer
